items.user_turn: I need this research turned into a client-ready package for Acme Manufacturing v. BrightHome LLC, Case No. 2026-CV-0142 (Alameda County Superior Court). The pre-mediation submission is due in mid-May at 9:00 AM PST. The client has a $25,000 cap for litigation-related work and will commit up to $5,000 for settlement negotiation only. Here is the relevant contract excerpt: "Seller warrants that the Product will be free from defects in materials and workmanship for a period of 24 months from delivery. Remedies are limited to repair or replacement at Seller's option. Seller disclaims all other warranties, including implied warranties of merchantability and fitness." Please produce: (1) a one-page executive summary of key holdings and likely outcomes tailored to Alameda County practice, (2) a prioritized list of recommended contract clause revisions and negotiation/litigation options that fit the client's budget and risk tolerance, and (3) a draft client email to Maria Espinoza and a Q&A checklist they can use before the pre-mediation submission.
